key_insight: PAC Studio ML is a human-in-the-loop, physics-informed ML environment that speeds PAC spectrum inverse analysis while keeping expert judgment central.
engineering_relevance: It helps materials scientists explore site-count hypotheses, generate better initial fits, and improve reproducibility for ill-conditioned PAC characterization problems.
method: Hamiltonian-based forward PAC model + synthetic training library
Feature extraction with one-, two-, and three-site ML predictors
ML-seeded nonlinear least-squares refinement, Auto sites screening, diagnostics, and export
evidence_signal: Held-out synthetic tests and BiFeO3 case studies show proof of operation and illustrate that some PAC parameters are much harder to recover than others.
watch_item: The software is a support tool rather than a replacement for expert fitting, and its results depend on synthetic training choices, initialization, and physics constraints.
paper_title: PAC Studio Machine Learning: Human-in-the-Loop Analysis of TDPAC Spectra
